name: Easy Danish Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter or margarine with sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg and vanilla extract; beat well.
3. Gradually add flour, baking soda, and cinnamon; mix until combined.
4. Stir in the grated apples and beat by hand until fully incorporated.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-by-9-inch pan.
6. Combine the topping ingredients of sugar, cinnamon, and chopped nuts.
7. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
Note: Nutritional analysis per serving is not provided in the original recipe.
